paths._app_root_note: pythonpath=backend so imports are from app.*. Write files as backend/app/core/x.py — never backend/app/app/.

database_session.reason: Route handlers must use get_db() as a FastAPI dependency — it executes SET search_path per request for schema-per-tenant isolation. Direct psycopg2 or SessionLocal bypasses tenant routing entirely.

settings_singleton.reason: Always use get_settings() (lru_cache singleton). Directly instantiating Settings() creates a second instance and ignores .env overrides in test environments.

execution._deploy_command_note: Set to 'docker compose up --build -d' when integration tests need a live DB. null = unit-only mode (TestClient, no Docker required).
execution._services_note: backend service maps to docker compose target 'backend'. Used when deploy_command is set for integration test runs.

rules.unowned_files: Files NOT listed in the PRD estimated_files are read-only. You may read them for context. You may never write, edit, or include them in your output JSON. If solving the feature seems to require modifying an unowned file, re-read your scope — the answer is in your scoped files.
